ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for the Agent SDK

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Fine-grained GitHub PAT scoped to the demo repo with Contents:write + Workflows:write

DEMO_REPO_URL.description: HTTPS URL of the demo repo, e.g. https://github.com/<user>/task1-cicd-skills

GIT_USER_NAME.description: Committer name used inside the scratch clone (optional)

GIT_USER_EMAIL.description: Committer email used inside the scratch clone (optional)
